name: T.A.C. Consumer Public Company Limited
summary: T.A.C. Consumer Public Company Limited engages in the sourcing, manufacture, and distribution of beverage and lifestyle products in Thailand and internationally. The company provides Zenya, a ready-to-drink green tea mixed with fruit juices, minerals, and vitamins; Na-Arun, a milk green tea; Sa-was-dee, a hot beverage containing Durain, a kind of fruit; and Hershey's, a chocolate milk drink. It also offers B2B Drink Dispenser, a dispenser drink; and All Caf√É¬©, an instant drink, as well as hot beverage vending machines. In addition, the company is involved in caf√É¬© business under the Caf√É¬© MuanChon, Jungle Caf√É¬©, Arabitia Caf√É¬©, CP Fresh Mart, and Black Canyon names; and character business under the San-X, Dog Please, and Art Story names. Further, it licenses its products in Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Cambodia, Myanmar, Laos, and Vietnam. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
